page: Microsoft Azure D2ds_v5 is a general-purpose virtual machine belonging to the DDSv5 family, running on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. It features an x86_64 architecture powered by an Intel Xeon 8370C processor operating at 2.8 GHz. The configuration includes 2 vCPUs mapped to 1 physical core with 2 threads per core, providing dedicated CPU allocation. Memory capacity is 8.0 GB, yielding 4.0 GB per core. The instance is bundled with 77 GB of local storage and is Premium Storage capable, though it does not include any complimentary public IPv4 addresses or GPU accelerators.

Performance benchmarks indicate average single-core capabilities but limited multi-core scaling. The stress-ng single-core CPU performance and Geekbench single-core scores sit in the average range, supported by hardware flags like AVX-512 and cryptography acceleration. However, multi-core benchmarks, including stress-ng multi-core and Geekbench multi-core, fall into the poor category due to the physical single-core limitation. Memory bandwidth is also constrained, with uncached read and write speeds categorized as poor.

From a cost-efficiency perspective, the D2ds_v5 offers a balanced resource density for entry-level workloads requiring dedicated CPU allocation and local temporary storage without the premium cost of high-core instances. It is best suited for lightweight general-purpose workloads, basic web serving, single-threaded applications, and small-scale development or testing environments that do not demand high memory bandwidth or intensive multi-threaded processing.
description: Microsoft Azure D2ds_v5 is a general-purpose virtual machine from the DDSv5 family, utilizing the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. It is equipped with an x86_64 Intel Xeon 8370C processor running at 2.8 GHz, configured with 2 dedicated vCPUs from a single physical core. The instance includes 8.0 GB of RAM, 77 GB of local storage, and is Premium Storage capable, with no integrated GPU. Benchmark data shows average single-core performance in stress-ng and Geekbench, though multi-core scaling and memory bandwidth are limited. This virtual machine is qualitatively cost-effective for lightweight, dedicated workloads. It is best suited for basic web serving, single-threaded tasks, and small-scale development environments.
og_description: Microsoft Azure D2ds_v5 is a general-purpose virtual machine featuring 2 dedicated Intel Xeon vCPUs, 8.0 GB of RAM, and 77 GB of local storage, suitable for lightweight single-threaded workloads.

tagline: A dedicated dual-vCPU virtual machine with local storage, balanced for entry-level single-threaded workloads and basic web serving.

Equipped with 2 dedicated vCPUs and 8.0 GB of RAM
Includes 77 GB of local storage with Premium Storage capability
